hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [[ "$f" == *.py ]]; then /vol/bitbucket/ma5923/_projects/CertifiedContinualLearning/.venv/bin/ruff check --fix "$f"; /vol/bitbucket/ma5923/_projects/CertifiedContinualLearning/.venv/bin/ruff format "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
